phases.name: Complete Frontend Build
phases.description: Verify and complete the React dashboard. The diagnosis shows tsx_files: 0 despite rounds 11-17 creating components. Check web/dashboard/src/ for actual component files. If missing, create: LoginForm.tsx, JobList.tsx, Devices.tsx, Documents.tsx, Dashboard.tsx, Settings.tsx. Ensure web/dashboard/package.json has all dependencies (react, react-router-dom, @tanstack/react-query, axios). Run npm install and npm run build. Fix any TypeScript errors. Verify dashboard starts on port 3000 and connects to API gateway on port 8000.
success_criteria: npm run build completes without errors

phases.name: End-to-End Testing & Production Readiness
phases.description: Add comprehensive E2E test coverage. Create tests/e2e/ directory with Playwright or Cypress tests covering: user registration/login flow, device registration, print job submission (upload document → select printer → job created), job status tracking, and WebSocket notifications. Add docker-compose.e2e.yml for isolated test environment. Create E2E test script that: 1) Starts all services, 2) Runs health checks, 3) Executes E2E scenarios, 4) Generates coverage report. Add makefile target 'make test-e2e'. Ensure all 7 services (auth, registry, job, storage, notification, gateway, analytics) pass.
success_criteria: E2E tests cover all user workflows
All services pass health checks in sequence

phases.name: Security Hardening & Production Deployment
phases.description: Implement production security measures. Add: 1) Rate limiting middleware (5 req/sec for auth, 100 req/sec for others) using internal/middleware/ratelimit.go with Redis backend, 2) Request validation using internal/middleware/validation.go with schemas for all POST/PUT endpoints, 3) Secure headers middleware (CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS) in internal/middleware/security.go, 4) Environment-based config (dev/staging/prod) in services/*/config/, 5) Secrets management via environment variables only (no hardcoded secrets), 6) Docker security scan in CI (trivy or snyk). Update docker-compose.prod.yml with: non-root containers, read-only root filesystem where possible, resource limits, health checks with retries.
success_criteria: All POST endpoints validate input schemas
Security headers present on all responses

critical_issues: Frontend TSX files count is 0 - dashboard may not exist
No E2E test coverage for critical workflows

rationale: Phase 1 addresses the critical frontend gap—diagnosis shows 0 TSX files despite prior rounds creating components. Without a functional UI, the system is incomplete for users. Phase 2 validates the entire system works end-to-end before production. Phase 3 hardens security and deployment, essential for a cloud print platform handling sensitive documents. This order prioritizes: 1) Completeness, 2) Correctness, 3) Security.
